2606.27584.title: CoIn: Comprehensive 2D-3D Inpainting with Gaussian Splatting Guidance
2606.27584.paper_summary: 3D scene inpainting is essential for reconstructing areas corrupted by occlusions or limited viewpoints. While recent methods leverage Gaussian Splatting (GS) for efficient 3D editing, they often depend on precise multi-view segmentation masks and are inherently constrained to object removal tasks. We propose CoIn, a novel framework that bridges 2D inpainting models and 3DGS through a multi-stage consistency pipeline. Our approach first generates initial inpainted images using a diffusion model, enabling the use of arbitrary-shaped masks and diverse tasks like object insertion. We then introduce Reference Adaptive GS with Feature Attention to reconstruct a coarse 3D scene by adaptively weighing towards a reference view (2D -> 3D). This 3D representation provides geometric guidance to the diffusion process via GS-based Reference Feature Warping, ensuring multi-view consistency (3D -> 2D). Finally, a Texture-Enhancing Discriminator refines the 3D scene to achieve high photometric realism (2D -> 3D). Experiments show that CoIn, effectively leveraging bidirectional information flow, achieves state-of-the-art performance and effectively handles both object removal and object insertion with flexible mask input.
2606.27584.paper_summary_zh: 3D 場景修補對於重建因遮擋或視角限制而受損的區域至關重要。儘管最近的方法利用高斯噴霧 (GS) 進行高效的 3D 編輯，但它們通常依賴於精確的多視角分割掩模，並且固有地限制於物體移除任務。我們提出了 CoIn，一個新穎的框架，通過多階段一致性流程將 2D 修補模型和 3DGS 連接起來。我們的方法首先使用擴散模型生成初步的修補圖像，使得可以使用任意形狀的掩模和多樣的任務，例如物體插入。然後，我們引入了具有特徵注意力的參考自適應 GS，以通過自適應地加權參考視圖來重建粗略的 3D 場景 (2D -> 3D)。這種 3D 表示通過基於 GS 的參考特徵變形為擴散過程提供幾何指導，確保多視角一致性 (3D -> 2D)。最後，一個紋理增強鑑別器對 3D 場景進行精煉，以實現高光度現實感 (2D -> 3D)。實驗表明，CoIn 有效利用雙向信息流，實現了最先進的性能，並有效處理物體移除和物體插入，具有靈活的掩模輸入。
2606.27584.author: Hana Kim et.al.
2606.27584.authors: Hana Kim, Minje Kim, Tae-Kyun Kim
